Player Ship Profile

EnginePlayer Queen
Default weapons3
Base techs4
Special traits3
Base health10
Base shield5
Base shield regen4
Base armor10

It's a flying insect, what more do I need to tell you...

The jaws deals heavy damage to anyone who gets caught between them. Can NOT be replicated in the pirate bay.

Ship Stats

HP1800
Shield620
Regen40
Armor30
Radius30

Player accessBuyable ship
Known hangars11

Default Weapons

WeaponStart levelSlotType
Moth Queen Spit Gland01projectile
Moth Zero Gland02projectile
Jaws03projectile

Default Upgrades

TechStart levelWhat it gives
Engine3Increases acceleration and speed. - Can boost speed. Good in PvP.
Shield3Increases shield amount and regeneration rate. - Can block heavy hits. - Shield Bonuses scale with player level. Good vs hard hitting weapons.
Power0Increases power regeneration and maximum power. - Can boost damage output at the cost of power. Good for dealing more damage for longer periods.
Armor3Increases health and armor amount. Armor reduces damage by its value per hit. - Can restore health. - armor bonuses scale with player level. Good vs fast hitting weapons.

Ship Specialties

TraitBonus
Speed100%
Kinetic damage75%
Corrosive damage75%
